# GeoGuessr Helper — Copilot Instructions

## Project

A pnpm workspace with:

- Frontend: Next.js 16 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Leaflet + react-leaflet
- Backend: NestJS API on port 3001 for GeoJSON, map metadata, and filter computation
- Crawler scripts in `backend/crawlers/` for external guide scraping, consolidation, extraction, and append-only merging

## Architecture

- `src/app/` — App Router pages. Main page is a full-screen map with sidebar filters.
- `src/components/` — React components. `WorldMap.tsx` is a `"use client"` Leaflet wrapper.
- `src/lib/api/` — API wrappers for backend endpoints (`/api/data/geojson`, `/api/data/map`, `/api/data/filter`).
- `src/types/map-data.ts` — Frontend contracts for map/filter API payloads.
- `backend/src/modules/data/` — NestJS data module (controller, DTO, service).
- `backend/src/modules/data/dto/filter-request.dto.ts` — DTO validation for filter endpoint.
- `backend/crawlers/` — guide-source scraper + consolidation + extraction + append-only merge scripts.
- `public/countries.geo.json` — Source GeoJSON file read by backend service.

## Conventions

- Mark any component using Leaflet or browser APIs with `"use client"`.
- Load Leaflet components via `next/dynamic` with `{ ssr: false }`.
- Keep data/filter business logic on backend when possible.
- Use Tailwind utility classes. Dark theme is default.
- Path alias: `@/*` maps to `./src/*`.
- `backend/src/data/geo-car-helpdesk.ts` is regenerated by `pnpm --filter geoguessr-helper-backend sync:data`.
- Crawler-derived additions are reapplied automatically after every sync via `merge:crawlers`.
- Treat `backend/crawlers/data/` as generated local output, not source code.
- `crawl:guides` reads `GUIDE_SOURCE_BASE_URL` and optional `GUIDE_SOURCE_SITEMAP_URL`, `GUIDE_CRAWL_LIMIT`, and `GUIDE_CRAWL_DELAY_MS` from env.

## Commands

- Frontend dev: `pnpm dev`
- Backend dev: `pnpm dev:backend`
- Frontend build: `pnpm build`
- Backend build: `pnpm build:backend`
- Backend tests: `pnpm --filter geoguessr-helper-backend test`
- GeoCarHelpDesk sync: `pnpm --filter geoguessr-helper-backend sync:data`
- Guide crawl: `pnpm --filter geoguessr-helper-backend crawl:guides`
- Guide consolidation: `pnpm --filter geoguessr-helper-backend consolidate:guides`
- Guide extraction: `pnpm --filter geoguessr-helper-backend extract:guides`
- Crawler append-only merge: `pnpm --filter geoguessr-helper-backend merge:crawlers`

## Adding a new filter

1. Extend backend DTO in `backend/src/modules/data/dto/filter-request.dto.ts`.
2. Update backend filter logic in `backend/src/modules/data/data.service.ts`.
3. Update frontend contracts in `src/types/map-data.ts`.
4. Update frontend request payload in `src/app/page.tsx`.
5. Add or update backend tests in `backend/src/modules/data/*.test.ts`.

## Generated Data Rules

- Commit crawler scripts in `backend/crawlers/`, but do not commit generated crawler output.
- Do not overwrite existing dataset keys with extracted crawler results; the merge flow is append-only.
